title: Resolution Commending and Congratulating Michael Oboza Concio Jr. From Barangay Mayondon, Los Baños, Laguna for Winning Second Place at the Fide Asian Zonals 3.3 Chess Championship 2021 Claiming the Second Slot to the Chess World Cup 2021 Slated on July 10, 2021 in Sochi, Russia. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Geronimo A. Ciceron, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Hon. Rodora P. Loares, Hon. Arlene P. Delos Santos,
